selections.name: Fine Ace
selections.reason: Has shown enough in recent starts to be highly competitive in a very weak maiden field. Draws well to get a soft run.

selections.name: Minimise
selections.reason: Fair debut effort when 5th at Balaklava. Open to natural improvement second-up.

selections.name: Love To Lie
selections.reason: Has shown glimpses of ability in previous preparations and can feature if she brings her best.

selections.name: Shamus In Pontivy
selections.reason: Needs to lift on recent efforts but finds a race lacking depth.

danger_horse.name: Valor Bound
danger_horse.reason: Could improve second-up after a moderate return.

selections.name: Winning All Round
selections.reason: Excellent debut when 2nd at Balaklava. Will take plenty of benefit from that experience and looks the clear top pick.

selections.name: Mandarin
selections.reason: Consistent mare who rarely runs a bad race. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 to be right in the finish.

selections.name: Sayersitisn'tso
selections.reason: Resuming from a break. Has trialed adequately and can run a cheeky race fresh.

selections.name: Paganini
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw and has placed third-up in the past. Capable of a better showing.

danger_horse.name: Broke The Seal
danger_horse.reason: Has been around the mark recently but the wide draw is a concern.

selections.name: Forever A Diamond
selections.reason: Third-up today. Held ground well last start and profiles nicely to break through in this company.

selections.name: Minya Murra
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start at Balaklava. This race is well within her grasp if she holds that form.

selections.name: Roadking
selections.reason: Was well-supported on debut but only managed 7th. Capable of plenty of improvement here.

selections.name: Lady Biv
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back from a spell. Needs to lift but draws well.

danger_horse.name: Magna Torino
danger_horse.reason: Comes off a let-up. Has shown minor ability and could sneak into the placings.

selections.name: Harsh
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd two starts back and wasn't far away last time. Draws perfectly and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Peta's Heart
selections.reason: Third-up today. Well placed in this grade and should prove hard to beat if she finds her best form.

selections.name: Sentimental Flame
selections.reason: Classy mare dropping in grade. Progressing well and a win is certainly on the cards.

selections.name: Retourne (NZ)
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw. Was a solid 3rd two starts back and can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Quick Qudos (GB)
danger_horse.reason: Needs to improve on recent efforts but has the ability to feature on his best day.

selections.name: Like A Drifter
selections.reason: Scored a big 4 length win at Murray Bridge recently. Has plenty of upside and can overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Over Yonder
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who is progressing well. Draws nicely and a win is near.

selections.name: Cosmic Interlude
selections.reason: Won well at Balaklava last start. Flashing home late and will be dangerous.

selections.name: Tanna
selections.reason: Strong winning chance after a solid victory at Naracoorte. Maps to get a good run.

danger_horse.name: Justacclaim
danger_horse.reason: Resuming from a break. Won well last campaign and can run a bold race fresh.

selections.name: Kikkuli
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and wasn't disgraced last time. Favourable alley enhances his winning prospects.

selections.name: Enciphering
selections.reason: Consistent type who is always around the mark. Looks a definite winning hope despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Loca Bella
selections.reason: Will be saved up for one last crack at them. Can feature if the pace is on.

selections.name: Belle From Hell
selections.reason: Second run back from a spell. Worth consideration on her best form.

danger_horse.name: Sadler's Song
danger_horse.reason: Out of her depth last start but can bounce back in this easier grade.
